title: Rapid Removal of Ibuprofen from Aqueous Solutions by Pyrolysed Rice-Husk Modified with Bacillus cereus Biocomposite
description: SpeakForWater Episode 2: Rapid Removal of Ibuprofen from Aqueous Solutions by Pyrolysed Rice-Husk Modified with Bacillus cereus Biocomposite. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
